name: ai-pathfinder
description: AI PathFinder is a web application that helps users plan their career path, find learning resources, and search for jobs. It uses AI to provide personalized recommendations based on the user's skills and experience.

scripts.install: npm run setup:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.start: start powershell -Command "npm run start:backend" && start powershell -Command "npm run start:frontend" && powershell -Command "(New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application).MinimizeAll()" && wait-on http://localhost:5173 && start http://localhost:5173
